shortDescription: Contemporary 1-bedroom apartment in East Danforth with designer finishes and vibrant neighbourhood.
fullDescription: Welcome to 12 Torrens Avenue in the vibrant East Danforth neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
